entities.description: A flowchart diagram illustrating a three-stage process involving planning, retrieval, and generation to answer a question.
The input trigger for the system, represented by an icon of a person with a question mark.
The first stage of the process, which handles classification and planning tasks.
The second stage of the process, utilizing scent or filter-based mechanisms to retrieve information.
The third stage of the process, responsible for analysis and merging data to form the output.
The final output of the system, symbolized by a lightbulb icon.
